research_goal: Understand how unfinished V5 Hong Kong retail-banking personas currently manage investment portfolios, which Aladdin-based analytics functions would materially help them in real decisions, why those functions matter, and how each should be embedded into retail customer journeys without turning the experience into generic product selling.
product_context: The bank has already decided to launch a free Portfolio Health Check for retail customers using Aladdin-type analytics. This study is about practical usage design, feature usefulness, explanation boundaries, trust boundaries, and service embedding into retail banking workflows. Do not test willingness to pay; treat the service as free for all retail customers.
synthetic_only_disclaimer: Synthetic-user interview for AI pre-validation only; not human market evidence.

facilitator_decisions.decision_rationale: Concept mode requires current behaviour before introducing the concept. No transcript exists yet, so the strongest first move is a neutral, domain-specific prompt for the participant’s most recent portfolio-review behaviour.
facilitator_decisions.message_to_persona: 你最近一次認真睇自己投資組合係幾時，當時發生咗咩事？
open_questions: 最近一次實際 portfolio review / monitoring 事件係乜
當時用咗咩方法、工具同 workaround
之後邊個 customer moment 最適合引入 Portfolio Health Check
對資料整合、提示、解釋同 RM 介面嘅信任邊界係乜
